## Checklist

- [ ] The server type-checks (`pnpm -F @form-builder/server exec tsc --noEmit`).
- [ ] The client lints and builds (`pnpm -F @form-builder/client lint && pnpm -F @form-builder/client build`).
- [ ] I formatted my code with Prettier.
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, or debug `console.log`s are committed.
- [ ] I updated documentation where relevant.
